<Heading

  children={"Sync sources"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/projects/{slug}/sources/sync/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Re-crawl all project sources and update the search index.

**Required permission:** `project_sync`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
